label: Day 7 — Afternoon: Finalizing Outputs
description: Finalisation and quality check for both outputs. Teams complete their Green Map entries, refine their Escape Room designs, and conduct a structured peer review of each other's work before publication.
objectives: Complete all Green Map entries to publication standard
Finalise all four Escape Room room designs
Conduct meaningful peer review using agreed quality criteria
Prepare both outputs for official publication/submission

steps.title: Quality checklist briefing
steps.body: Facilitator presents the two quality checklists (one for the Green Map, one for the Escape Room). Teams understand exactly what 'done' looks like before they start.

steps.title: Finalisation sprint
steps.body: Teams work on their outputs simultaneously: completing missing Green Map entries, polishing room design documents. Facilitator and group leaders circulate to support.

steps.title: Cross-team peer review
steps.body: Teams rotate: Team A reviews Team B's map entries + Team B reviews Team A's room design. Feedback is structured: one thing strong / one thing that could be clearer / one question I have.

steps.title: Final revisions & sign-off
steps.body: Teams incorporate feedback and make final adjustments. Facilitator officially marks both outputs as 'ready for publication.' Group celebrates with a brief round: one word for what we created this week.

facilitatorNote: Don't let the peer review become polite and superficial. Push teams to give honest, specific feedback. The publication moment at the end should feel ceremonial — mark it.
